email.subject: RCA - JOB1 Failure - PROD
email.body:
Dear Team,

The scheduled VisualCron job JOB1 failed in the PROD environment.

Root Cause
-----------
Missing permissions

Business Impact
---------------
Job delayed

Technical Impact
----------------
Batch blocked

Recommended Resolution
----------------------
Fix permissions

Please let us know if any additional information is required.

Regards,

AI L1 Support Agent

analysis.root_cause: No error information provided in the logs.
analysis.business_impact: Insufficient information to determine business impact.
analysis.technical_impact: Insufficient information to determine technical impact.
analysis.recommended_resolution: Review the job configuration and ensure all required logs are enabled for detailed troubleshooting.

analysis.business_impact: The file import process failed, preventing data from being processed and potentially causing delays in business operations.
analysis.technical_impact: The VB Script failed to locate the required input file, resulting in an immediate termination of the batch process and subsequent job failure.
analysis.recommended_resolution: Verify the file path and ensure the file is available at the specified location. Check the SFTP server connectivity and file transfer process to confirm the file was successfully uploaded.

email.subject: RCA - BAI2_File_Import Failure - PROD
email.body:
Dear Team,

The scheduled VisualCron job BAI2_File_Import failed in the PROD environment.

Root Cause
-----------
Input file not found. Path: \\SFTPServer\Inbound\BAI2\BAI2_20260703.txt

Business Impact
---------------
The file import process failed, preventing data from being processed and potentially causing delays in business operations.

Technical Impact
----------------
The VB Script failed to locate the required input file, resulting in an immediate termination of the batch process and subsequent job failure.

Recommended Resolution
----------------------
Verify the file path and ensure the file is available at the specified location. Check the SFTP server connectivity and file transfer process to confirm the file was successfully uploaded.

Please let us know if any additional information is required.

Regards,

AI L1 Support Agent
